required_local_proof: `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/pipeline-cron-heartbeat-check.test.ts --reporter=verbose`; `npm run build`; `npm run health`; rerun-mode `npm run check:pipeline-heartbeat` against the same-day UTC window
required_browser_proof: Trigger or observe a fresh GitHub `Pipeline cron heartbeat` run on the new head commit and confirm the hosted check passes with the new same-day UTC window semantics.
browser_proof_command: Done means: the heartbeat script checks `daily_brief` `cron_complete` rows from today's expected UTC lower bound through now, late-day reruns pass when the same-day row exists, yesterday's rows do not count, and the hosted `Pipeline cron heartbeat` workflow passes on the new commit.
anti_regression_checks: Heartbeat query window starts at today's expected UTC lower bound, not `Date.now() - 3h`.
Late-day reruns still pass when the same-day `daily_brief` `cron_complete` row exists after the lower bound.
Yesterday's `daily_brief` `cron_complete` rows do not satisfy today's check.
next_command: Run the heartbeat-semantics seam only. Allowed: .github/workflows/pipeline-cron-heartbeat.yml | scripts/pipeline-cron-heartbeat-check.ts | scripts/__tests__/pipeline-cron-heartbeat-check.test.ts | ACTIVE_HANDOFF.md | SESSION_HISTORY.md | .foldera-contract.json. Forbidden: briefing/generation/runtime/auth/billing/schema files. Local proof: `npx vitest run scripts/__tests__/pipeline-cron-heartbeat-check.test.ts --reporter=verbose`; `npm run build`; `npm run health`; rerun-mode `npm run check:pipeline-heartbeat`. Hosted proof: trigger or observe a fresh GitHub `Pipeline cron heartbeat` run on the new head commit.
